examples: I was reluctant to embroil myself in his problems.
Any hostilities could result in retaliation and further embroil U.N. troops in fighting.
Don't embroil me in your quarrel.
"It could embroil the United States in a significant, lengthy, and uncertain military commitment, " he said.
To complicate matters further, this conflict could embroil other East African nations, including Kenya, Sudan, and Uganda.
